input: What if these shoes don't fit?
actual_output: We offer a 30-day full refund at no extra cost.
expected_output: You can return shoes within 30 days for a full refund at no cost.
retrieval_context: All customers are eligible for a 30 day full refund at no extra cost.
Refunds are processed within 5 business days.

actual_output: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days.
expected_output: Standard shipping arrives in 3-5 business days.
retrieval_context: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days across the country.
Express shipping is available for next-day delivery.

actual_output: Yes, we sell replacement laces in black, white, and brown for $5 per pair.
expected_output: Yes, replacement laces are available in several colors for $5.
retrieval_context: Replacement laces are sold for $5 per pair.
Available colors include black, white, and brown.

input: Can I change my order after placing it?
actual_output: Orders can be modified within 1 hour of purchase by contacting support.
expected_output: You can modify your order within 1 hour of purchase by contacting support.
retrieval_context: Orders may be modified within 60 minutes of purchase.
Please contact customer support to make changes.

actual_output: Yes, our loyalty program gives you 100 free pairs of shoes every month.
expected_output: Yes, members earn 1 point per dollar spent and can redeem points for discounts.
retrieval_context: Our loyalty program awards 1 point per dollar spent.
Points can be redeemed for discounts on future purchases.
